integration_evidence.summary: Common task submission semantics, entry projection boundaries, fixture shape, conformance checklist, and research absorption decisions are integrated into repo docs.
GH-57 is the Loom anchor Work Item for the docs-only PR.
GH-56, GH-57, GH-58, GH-59, and GH-60 issue coverage is mapped without marking host issues complete.
Validation commands and gate classifications are recorded in the GH-57 progress carrier.
